title: Someone's Wife in the Boat of Someone's Husband
original_title: Someone's Wife in the Boat of Someone's Husband
overview: Mar believes in the mysterious legend of the lovers Halimah and Sukab on the island of Sawai from a hundred years ago. She travels to Sawai to experience what Halimah once felt, hoping to find Sukab there.
